summary: Segment transcripts into workflow chunks and extend NormalizedToolCall with optional result field
context: Real sessions contain multiple workflows (orient, decide, verify cycles). Scorers currently evaluate single workflow sequences. Need to bridge the gap between long sessions and scorer input format.
rationale: Workflow segmentation gives granular per-workflow scores rather than one blunt session score. Extending NormalizedToolCall with optional result field is backward-compatible — existing scorers ignore it, Phase 18 LLM judge uses it.

alternatives.option: Score entire transcript as single ScorerInput
alternatives.reason_rejected: Partial workflows would unfairly penalize sessions; one bad segment drowns good ones

alternatives.option: Separate results array in ScorerInput instead of extending NormalizedToolCall
alternatives.reason_rejected: Pairing by index is fragile; co-locating result with its call is cleaner
